basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released the official Project Assistant (Admin.) Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 Project Assistant (Admin.) vacancy has been announced under the IIT Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a 3 year Diploma in an appropriate discipline or a Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with 2 years of relevant work experience can apply via email on or before 15-07-2026. The age limit is as per the official notification. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma (03 Years duration)/Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with 2 years of relevant work experience
qualification.details: For Project Assistant (Admin.) Post: Diploma (03 Years duration)/Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with 2 years of relevant work experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Submitting Applications by Email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for the Project Assistant (Admin.) post at IIT Delhi is 15 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant (Admin.) at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Project Assistant (Admin.) position in the IIT Delhi recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) posts?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates need to apply for the Project Assistant (Admin.) position by sending their application via email. Detailed instructions are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Project Assistant (Admin.) post at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant (Admin.) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Project Assistant (Admin.) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma (03 Years duration) or a Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline, along with 2 years of relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Assistant (Admin.) recruitment at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Project Assistant (Admin.) at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant (Admin.) post involves an initial shortlisting of candidates, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted applicants.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or directly from the IIT Delhi official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for IIT Delhi recruitment related to this advertisement is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec. Candidates can visit it for more details.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Project Assistant (Admin.) position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant (Admin.) position at IIT Delhi is a Contractual job type. Candidates should review the notification for contract duration details.
